name: GetResult
summary: Possible results from GetObject.Get(), GetPoint.Get(), etc...

enum_values.name: Cancel
enum_values.summary: User wants to cancel current command.

enum_values.name: Nothing
enum_values.summary: User pressed enter - typically used to accept defaults.

enum_values.name: Option
enum_values.summary: User specified an option - call Option() to get option index.

enum_values.name: Number
enum_values.summary: User entered a real number - call Number() to get value.

enum_values.name: Color
enum_values.summary: User entered a color - call Color() to get value.

enum_values.name: Undo
enum_values.summary: User pressed undo.

enum_values.name: Miss
enum_values.summary: User clicked and missed.

enum_values.name: Point
enum_values.summary: User picked 3d point - call Point() to get 3d point.

enum_values.name: Point2d
enum_values.summary: User picked 2d window point in CRhinoGetPoint::Get2dPoint() call ON_2dPoint() to get the point and View() to get the view.

enum_values.name: Line2d
enum_values.summary: User picked a 2d line in CRhinoGetPoint::Get2dLine() call Line2d() to get the line and View() to get the view.

enum_values.name: Rectangle2d
enum_values.summary: User picked a 2d rectangle in CRhinoGetPoint::Get2dRectangle() call Rectangle2d() to get the rectangle and View() to get the view.

enum_values.name: Object
enum_values.summary: User selected an object - call Object() to get object.

enum_values.name: String
enum_values.summary: User typed a string - call String() to get the string.

enum_values.name: CustomMessage
enum_values.summary: A custom message was posted to the RhinoGet

enum_values.name: Timeout
enum_values.summary: The getter waited for the amount of time specified in RhinoGet::SetWaitDuration() and then gave up.

enum_values.name: Circle
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetCircle::GetCircle() to get the circle.

enum_values.name: Plane
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetPlane::GetPlane() to get the plane.

enum_values.name: Cylinder
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetCylinder::GetCylinder() to get the cylinder.

enum_values.name: Sphere
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetSphere::GetSphere() to get the sphere.

enum_values.name: Angle
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetAngle::Angle() to get the angle in radians (CRhinoGetAngle() returns this for typed number, too).

enum_values.name: Distance
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetDistance::Distance() to get the distance value.

enum_values.name: Direction
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetDirection::Direction() to get the direction vector.

enum_values.name: Frame
enum_values.summary: call CRhinoGetFrame::Frame() to get the frame that was picked.

enum_values.name: ExitRhino
enum_values.summary: Stop now, do not cleanup, just return ASAP.
